infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Starr Field uses Face ID to unlock the app and confirm sensitive actions like deleting field data.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Starr Field stamps your clock-in / clock-out times with GPS so timesheets and mileage logs are accurate.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Starr Field tracks location only while you're clocked in (per the privacy contract in plan §5.10.1) so the dispatcher knows where the crew is and IRS-compliant mileage logs generate automatically. Tracking stops within 60 seconds of clock-out.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Starr Field uses the camera to capture receipts and field photos. Receipt photos are uploaded to your private Starr Surveying workspace for AI extraction and bookkeeping.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Starr Field reads photos from your library when you attach an existing receipt photo (e.g. one you snapped before opening the app).

plugins.faceIDPermission: Starr Field uses Face ID to unlock the app and confirm sensitive actions like deleting field data.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Starr Field tracks location only while you're clocked in (per the privacy contract in plan §5.10.1) so the dispatcher knows where the crew is and IRS-compliant mileage logs generate automatically.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Starr Field stamps your clock-in / clock-out times with GPS so timesheets and mileage logs are accurate.

plugins.photosPermission: Starr Field reads photos from your library when you attach an existing receipt photo.
plugins.cameraPermission: Starr Field uses the camera to capture receipts and field photos.
